name: io.github.codespar/mcp-pluggy
description: Open Finance BR aggregator (TPP) — single API across all BR banks. Account discovery, balances, transactions, identity, investments, loans, and Pix payment initiation. Pluggy holds the ICP-Brasil cert + does DCR with each bank.

environment_variables.name: PLUGGY_CLIENT_ID
environment_variables.description: Client id from the Pluggy dashboard

environment_variables.name: PLUGGY_CLIENT_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Client secret paired with the client id — used to mint short-lived apiKey via POST /auth

tools.name: list_connectors
tools.description: List supported BR financial institutions (banks, fintechs, investment platforms)

tools.name: create_connect_token
tools.description: Short-lived token to bootstrap the Pluggy Connect widget for end-user authorization

tools.name: create_item
tools.description: Create a new bank connection (item) by linking a Pluggy user to an institution

tools.name: list_items
tools.description: List all items for the authenticated client

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get a single item with status + execution detail

tools.name: refresh_item
tools.description: Trigger a refresh of an item — re-syncs accounts, transactions, identities

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete an item and revoke its Open Finance consent

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List accounts under an item — one per bank account / credit card / investment portfolio

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get a single account with balance + bankData

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions for an account with date range + cursor pagination

tools.name: list_identities
tools.description: List identity records — name, CPF/CNPJ, addresses, phones, emails

tools.name: list_investments
tools.description: List investment positions (Tesouro, CDB, LCI, fundos, equities, crypto)

tools.name: list_loans
tools.description: List loan + credit positions (personal loans, financing, consignado)

tools.name: create_payment_intent
tools.description: Open Finance Pix payment initiation — payer authorizes at their bank's app

tools.name: get_payment_intent
tools.description: Get a payment intent with status + endToEndId + authorizationUrl

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List configured webhooks for item-status + payment-completed events
